notes.text: This advisory aggregates security fixes for the kernel SRPM in CIQ LTS for Rocky Linux 8.6. It addresses 23 CVEs: CVE-2024-26642, CVE-2024-26961, CVE-2024-35898, CVE-2021-47352, CVE-2021-47393, and 18 more.
notes.title: Description

references.summary: Canonical URL for this CSAF document
